The species Donax collinus is further classified into the genus Donax, which includes various species of sand-sweeps and other clams. The classification of Donax collinus is based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. As a member of the phylum Mollusca, Donax collinus is closely related to other types of clams and mussels.
